questions.question: Consider a dataset containing the exam scores of students who took a math exam. The dataset includes the scores and a variable 'exam_type' which can take the values 'multiple-choice' or 'essay'. Analyze how the scores vary across different types of exams. (5 marks)

Suppose we have a dataset of students' heights and weights. We want to explore the relationship between these two variables. Provide a table summarizing the statistics of the relationship, including the correlation coefficient, p-value, and 95% confidence interval. (10 marks)

A company has collected data on the number of hours worked and the salary of its employees. Analyze the relationship between these two variables. Plot a scatterplot to visualize the data, and describe the type of relationship you observe. (15 marks)
